reproducibility.seed_used: n/a (model inference deterministic via Ollama batch mode)

notes: First Memgentic baseline number committed to repo (per Plan 12 Phase 0 PR-A).
Establishes 60% R@5 as starting point against which subsequent PRs (B/C/D/E) measure attribution.
Run on cleaned LongMemEval-S subset; full 500-question run not yet executed (~3.5 hours estimated).
Heuristic-only classification: pipeline.intelligence_heuristic_only fired throughout — confirms Phase 0 PR-C LLM-wiring fix is genuinely needed.
All 50 questions in this subset are category=single-session-user (first 50 happen to share that type).
Misses are concentrated on questions where the gold session is an answer_* QA-pair (semantically dissimilar from the question) rather than a topical conversation.

phase_0_attribution_anchor.purpose: This is the PR-A baseline. PRs B (session-level scoring), C (LLM wiring), D (BM25 hybrid), E (Qwen3-Reranker) each report their delta against this number.
